title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VI. HEPATITIS C EDUCATION, PREVENTION,

SCREENING, AND TREATMENT

§1111.1. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Hepatitis C Education, Prevention, Screening, and Treatment Act".

            Acts 1999, No. 796, §1; Acts 2001, No. 940, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.161 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
PART VI.  HEPATITIS C EDUCATION, PREVENTION,
SCREENING, AND TREATMENT
§1111.1.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Hepatitis C Education, Prevention,
Screening, and Treatment Act".
Acts 1999, No. 796, §1; Acts 2001, No. 940, §1; Redesignated from R.S.
